Variables.Name: MaxSpectators
Variables.Description: Maximum number of spectators allowed by this server.

Variables.Name: MaxPlayers
Variables.Description: Maximum number of players allowed by this server.

Variables.Name: MaxPartySize
Variables.Description: Restrictions on the largest party that can join together

Variables.Name: MaxSplitscreensPerConnection
Variables.Description: Maximum number of splitscreen players to allow from one connection

Variables.Name: bRequiresPushToTalk
Variables.Description: Is voice enabled always or via a push to talk keybinding

Variables.Name: SessionName
Variables.Description: SessionName local copy from PlayerState class.  should really be define in this class, but need to address replication issues
